articles.author: NPR Staff
articles.title: U.S. Embassy in Baghdad again urges Americans to leave Iraq as Trump touts strikes on Iran - NPR
articles.description: In a post on Truth Social, President Trump claimed the U.S.  had "destroyed 100% of Iran's Military capability." The U.S. Embassy in Baghdad, meanwhile, urged Americans to "leave Iraq immediately."
articles.content:
President Trump asserted Saturday thatthe U.S. military had "destroyed 100% of Iran's Military capability," and that American forces had on Friday bombed the crucial oil sea port, Kharg Island.
